header.title: Meshtastic Configurator
header.description: Connect to a node, export the writable config, compare it to the YAML you want, and upload changes back to the device.

connection.title: Connection
connection.description: Chromium-based browsers are required for Web Serial and Web Bluetooth. Those transports only work on `https://` or `localhost`.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.livenode_status_msg: Connect to a node, then download its config.
